otherRequirements: Visa-free for tourism; the immigration officer decides the length of stay granted, up to a maximum of 180 days
Passport must be valid for the duration of your stay
You may be asked to show proof of onward or return travel and sufficient funds
sourceNote: gov.uk Mexico travel advice — visa-free for tourism, stay of up to 180 days granted on entry (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/mexico/entry-requirements)
